{{Infobox event
| name = Death
| introduced = cradle-11-dreadgod
}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Death]] entered the [[Iteration]] and caused it to shake.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c6">''Dreadgod'', chapter 6</ref>}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Death]] was calling [[Lindon]]'s name.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c3">''Waybound'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Death]] is embodied in a black hole.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c12">''Waybound'', chapter 12</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Events]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle events]]
